name: Gregory W. Robertson
title: Undergraduate Student at UCLA
affiliation: College of Letters and Science, Department of Economics
bio: I am an undergraduate student at UCLA, majoring in Economics. My research interests include behavioral economics, data science, and the intersection of technology and society.
I have experience working with large datasets and have developed skills in statistical analysis, machine learning, and programming languages such as Python and R.
Before UCLA, I completed a B.S. in Applied Mathematics at the University of Michigan.
